zh.Walsall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾瓦爾薩爾
zh.Bescot, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Hillary於1331年2月2日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親Sir Roger Hillary25歲，母親Katherine Sutton25歲。他於1353年與Margaret Audley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1400年6月13日享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Hillary于1331年2月2日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Sir Roger Hillary25岁，母亲Katherine Sutton25岁。他于1353年与Margaret Audley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1400年6月13日享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hillary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran.
English (of Norman origin):

from the Middle English and Old French male or female personal name Hilari(e), Ilari(e), and Elari(e), from Latin Hilarius and Hilaria ‘joyful’ (from Greek hilaros). The Latin name was chosen by many early Christians to express their joy and hope of salvation, and was borne by several saints, including a 4th-century bishop of Poitiers (died 368) noted for his vigorous resistance to the Arian heresy, and a 5th-century bishop of Arles. Largely due to veneration of Saint Hilarius of Poitiers, the name became popular in France in the forms Hilari and Hilaire, and was brought to England by the Norman conquerors. Although quite popular in France, it was only occasionally used in England, where it was confused with the name in 2 below.

variants.name: Ellery
meanings: variant of   Hillary  .
habitational name from Elleray in Windermere (Westmorland), probably from Old Norse elri ‘alder’ + vrá ‘nook’.
English:

variants.name: Gloor
meanings: Swiss German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Hilarius (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Hillier
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Surrey): occupational name for a roofer from Middle English hil(l)ier, hul(li)er, hel(li)er ‘roofer, slater, tiler’, agent nouns from the Middle English verb hil(i)en, hel(i)an, hul(i)en ‘to put a roof on; cover with a roof’.
French: from the personal name Hillier, a vernacular form of Hilaire (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Alario
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orazio, Carlo, Rocco, Salvatore, Vita, Vitina.
Italian: from a vernacular form of the personal name Ilario, from Latin Hilarius (see Hillary ).
Italian (Sicily): probably a status name from dialect alariu ‘herald’.

variants.name: Glor
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the Latin personal name Hilarius (see Hillary ).

variants.name: Hillery
meanings: English: variant of   Hillary  . This name has long been established in Ireland (Clare).

variants.name: Hilaire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Antoine, Chantal, Edeline, Georges, Luc, Maryse, Mimose, Serge, Yolaine.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Hilaire, French form of Hillary 1. This surname is most common in Haiti. Compare Helaire .

variants.name: Hilleary
meanings: English (Essex): variant of   Hillary  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Allaire
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Lucien, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Emile, Michel, Pierre, Raoul, Raymonde, Rolande.
French: from the Old French personal name Allaire, a variant of Hilaire (see Hillary ). Compare Dallaire .

History: Jean and Charles Allaire, two brothers from the Poitou region of France, are recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1662 and 1663, respectively, the years of their marriage. The descendants of one or another brother also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Dallaire, Delair, and Delaire. — Alexandre Allaire, a Huguenot refugee, brought the name from La Rochelle in France to New Rochelle, NY, in 1686, via the West Indies. He is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Hilario
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Julio, Alfredo, Luis, Abelardo, Arturo, Eduardo, Francisco, Juan, Mario, Pedro, Carlos, Cesar.  Portuguese Afonso, Joao.
Portuguese (Hilário) and Spanish: from a personal name ofthe same origin as Hillary 1.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Hillary was born on 2 February 1331, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Hillary, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Sutton, was 25. He married Margaret Audley in 1353, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 June 1400, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Hillary est né le 2 février 1331, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Hillary, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Sutton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Audley en 1353, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1400, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Hillary am 2. Februar 1331 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Hillary 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Sutton 25. Er hat 1353 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Juni 1400 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hillary è nato il il 2 febbraio 1331 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Roger Hillary, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Sutton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Audley nel 1353, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 giugno 1400, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Hillary(이)가 1331년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Hillary(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Sutton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Margaret Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1400년 6월 13일 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hillary nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1331, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Hillary, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Sutton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Audley em 1353, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1400, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Hillary родился 2 февраля 1331 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Hillary было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Sutton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Audley в 1353 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 июня 1400 г. в возрасте 69 лет.
